rationale: The rule governs votingprocedures for consolidated taxing district boards. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises from increasing the exemption amount.
quote: Any action taken by the joint board must receive a favorable vote of a majority of each component district's board of trustees.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this governance provision.
